title: Critical Incident Briefing 2024-MCSO-009
narrative: On 2024-09-22 Maricopa County Sheriff's Office deputies responded to a residence in unincorporated Maricopa County. The subject, Renee Example, was charged with multiple offenses and pleaded guilty in 2024 to case number 2024-MCSO-009. Body-worn camera (BWC) footage from the responding deputies is included in the briefing video below.
